course.title: SQL Database Fundamentals
course.description: Learn SQL to query, manage, and analyze data in relational databases.

chapter.title: Aggregate Functions
chapter.description: Learn how to perform calculations on multiple rows using MIN, MAX, COUNT, AVG, and SUM.

lessons.title: MIN and MAX Functions
objectives: Find the smallest and largest values in a column
lessons.explanation: The `MIN()` function returns the smallest value of the selected column. The `MAX()` function returns the largest value of the selected column.
lessons.syntax:
SELECT MIN(column_name) FROM table_name;
SELECT MAX(column_name) FROM table_name;

exercises.statement: Find the highest (MAX) price in the `products` table.

lessons.title: COUNT, AVG, and SUM
lessons.explanation: The `COUNT()` function returns the number of rows that matches a specified criterion. `AVG()` returns the average value of a numeric column. `SUM()` returns the total sum of a numeric column.

exercises.statement: Calculate the total sum of the `quantity` column in the `orders` table.
